_provenance.data_source: NCBI RefSeq assembly report for GRCh38.p14 (assembled-molecule rows; RefSeq-Accn -> UCSC-style-name columns)
_provenance.verify: Re-derive by fetching the assembly report and taking assembled-molecule rows, columns RefSeq-Accn (col 7) -> UCSC-style-name (col 10). The accession VERSION is build-specific: GRCh37 chr1 is NC_000001.10, GRCh38 chr1 is NC_000001.11 -- a coordinate from the wrong build must NEVER be placed on hg38.
_provenance.ucsc_naming_note: UCSC-style names (chr1..chr22, chrX, chrY, chrM) match the contig names of IGV.js's hosted 'hg38' genome, so a placed off-target lands at the correct locus without remapping.
